description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in modern, athletic-inspired urban clothing. The figure wears a loose short-sleeve top with a high collar that partially covers the lower face, paired with knee-length shorts featuring angular paneling and fitted leg guards on one leg. The individual has a distinctive topknot hairstyle, and the face is partially obscured by a mask or high collar. The arms are relaxed at the sides, and the stance is wide and balanced, suggesting readiness or alertness. The footwear is streamlined and athletic, suitable for urban movement. The overall appearance is that of a contemporary, agile city dweller, possibly inspired by streetwear or futuristic fashion.
description: A stylized adult male in modern athletic streetwear with a high-collared top, knee-length shorts, and a topknot hairstyle, standing in a balanced pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared top, partially masked face, and detailed shorts with visible leg guard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the topknot hairstyle, the profile of the high collar, and the fitted leg guard.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the topknot, the loose fit of the shirt, and the shorts' rear paneling.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the angular design of the leg guard and the relaxed arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic streetwear with a high-collared short-sleeve top, knee-length shorts, and fitted leg guard
attribute_posture: standing upright with a balanced stance
